homeText.generatePdfLabel: Generate venue brief from this page

cv.headline: Live music venue operations and transactional ticketing
cv.summary: Platform for live music venues that need event publishing, secure ticketing, split payouts, and fast night-of-show operations.

highlights: Publish events with door times, soundchecks, and inventory controls.
Manage payouts, routing, and performer access from one admin surface.
Keep brand presentation editable through venue-driven theme tokens.
Protect checkout flows with idempotency keys on unreliable mobile networks.
Split consumer fees, processor fees, venue revenue, and artist payouts automatically.

projects.title: Public event landing pages
projects.description: SEO-ready event pages with JSON-LD, Open Graph tags, and local-feed caching for faster consumer booking.

subtitle: Night operations, agile ticketing, and clearer settlements.
heroText: Platform for independent venues in Guadalajara that need to publish shows, sell tickets, coordinate artists, and close the night with less operational friction.
bioTitle: Digital infrastructure for venues and promoters
bioText: Foro GDL combines event administration, transactional checkout, and settlement control in an interface designed for small teams that need to move fast and avoid operational errors.
credentials: Event, artist, and staff operations from one workflow
Consumer surcharge plus automated payout-fee monetization
Mobile experience optimized for audiences on 4G networks
servicesIntro: Modules for venues, promoters, and artists that need to operate without friction.

services.title: Programming and scheduling
services.description: Manage doors, soundchecks, capacity, and Google Calendar sync from a single view.

services.title: Checkout and access control
services.description: Protect inventory with atomic transactions, idempotency, and secure QR admission.

services.title: Split payouts and ledger
services.description: Track consumer fees, processor costs, venue net, and artist net in an immutable ledger.

bookingInfo: Each event is quoted according to ensemble size, repertoire, location, and production needs. Arrangements and remote recording can also be booked per project.
contactTitle: Bring better operations to your venue
contactText: Reach out to implement transactional ticketing, an operations dashboard, artist profiles, or automated settlements.

testimonials.quote: The cached mobile event feed made the public experience feel much faster on weak signal nights.
testimonials.name: Mariana R.

testimonials.quote: The platform finally gave us one place for event setup, ticketing, and settlement visibility.
testimonials.name: Daniel C.

testimonials.quote: We stopped guessing at payout math and could explain every peso in the ledger after the show.
testimonials.name: Alex M.

seo.title: Foro GDL | Venue management and ticketing platform
seo.description: Micro-SaaS for live music venues with event administration, transactional ticketing, split payouts, and mobile-first operations.

cv.headline: Operacion de venues y ticketing transaccional
cv.summary: Plataforma para venues de musica en vivo con publicacion de eventos, checkout seguro, payouts automatizados y control operativo.

es.subtitle: Operacion nocturna, ticketing agil y liquidaciones claras.
es.heroText: Plataforma para venues independientes en Guadalajara que necesitan publicar shows, vender boletos, coordinar artistas y cerrar la noche con menos friccion operativa.
es.bioTitle: Infraestructura digital para venues y promotores
es.bioText: Foro GDL combina administracion de eventos, checkout transaccional y control de liquidaciones en una interfaz pensada para equipos pequenos que operan rapido y con poco margen para errores.
credentials: Operacion de eventos, artistas y staff desde un mismo flujo
Cobro con sobrecargo al consumidor y fee de payout automatizado
Experiencia movil optimizada para publico en redes 4G
es.servicesIntro: Modulos pensados para venues, promotores y artistas que necesitan operar sin friccion.

services.title: Programacion y calendarizacion
services.description: Administra aperturas de puertas, soundchecks, cupo total y sincronizacion con Google Calendar desde una sola vista.

services.title: Checkout y control de acceso
services.description: Protege inventario con transacciones atomicas, idempotencia y QR seguro para acceso rapido.

services.title: Split payouts y ledger
services.description: Registra fee al consumidor, costo del procesador, neto al venue y neto al artista en un ledger inmutable.

es.bookingInfo: El modelo base mantiene la plataforma gratuita para venues y monetiza mediante el cargo fijo por boleto y el micro-porcentaje aplicado a payouts automatizados.
es.contactTitle: Llevemos mejor operacion a tu venue
es.contactText: Escribe para implementar ticketing transaccional, dashboard de operacion, perfiles de artistas o automatizacion de liquidaciones.
es.lessonIntro: Un flujo de adopcion pensado para venues que necesitan implementar operacion digital sin friccion.

lessonPackages.title: Fundamentos
lessonPackages.description: Para venues que quieren una base clara de operacion, configuracion de eventos y control de accesos.

lessonPackages.title: Improvisador
lessonPackages.description: Para equipos listos para automatizar aprobaciones, settlement y coordinacion con artistas.

lessonPackages.title: Intensivo artístico
lessonPackages.description: Para músicos preparando audiciones, grabaciones, sets en vivo o un salto serio en musicalidad.

es.galleryIntro: Un lenguaje visual de escenarios nocturnos, educación boutique, sesiones pulidas y brillo de amplificador.

gallery.title: Vocabulario Blue Note
gallery.description: Fraseo jazz moderno, acompañamiento y desarrollo melódico.

gallery.title: Voltaje blues-rock
gallery.description: Leads expresivos, toque dinámico y tono listo para banda.

gallery.title: Estudio privado
gallery.description: Clases enfocadas alrededor de la voz musical del estudiante.

testimonials.quote: Las clases conectaron por fin la teoría con el mástil. Dejé de memorizar formas y empecé a escuchar música.
testimonials.name: Mariana R.

testimonials.quote: El flujo de operacion nos permitio publicar, vender y controlar acceso sin depender de cinco herramientas distintas.
testimonials.name: Daniel C.

testimonials.quote: La parte de payouts y ledger nos dio claridad real sobre cuanto entra, cuanto se cobra y cuanto recibe cada artista.
testimonials.name: Alex M.

lessonIntro: An adoption path designed for venues that need digital operations without added friction.

lessonPackages.title: Artist Intensive
lessonPackages.description: For venues preparing high-volume nights, recurring bookings, or a serious leap in operational maturity.
